creature_bases.description: 生物モチーフ（巨大・老体・古代）

artistic_styles.description: 芸術スタイル（黒背景ホラー向け）
values: ink wash painting with severe contrast
sumi-e brush painting with dry strokes

aging_details.description: 老い・時間経過のディテール強調
values: long scars webbed across the body
pitted shell plates crumbling at edges
stone-like hide cracked like dried earth
mineral veins threading through scar tissue

lighting_scenarios.description: 極低照度の照明（黒背景固定）
values: single dying submersible lamp barely glowing
narrow flashlight beam fading into black
distant ROV headlights swallowed by void
thin emergency flare struggling in darkness

visibility_constraints.description: 見えないことへの恐怖演出
values: most of the form lost in darkness
only wrinkles and scars barely discernible
details surfacing then drowning in shadow
tiny submersible dwarfed near the body
diver floodlight a pinprick on the hide
only a single eye fills the entire frame
wrinkle patterns wider than a human
fathoms of flesh extending beyond view
absolute black background with muted grays
pitch black negative space and low-key lighting
charcoal palette where highlights barely emerge
inky black field with sparse cold highlights
obsidian void swallowing all but faint texture

atmospheres.description: 雰囲気（深海の不気味さ）

eye_descriptions.description: 目の描写（老いと巨大さ）
values: ancient clouded eye faintly catching light
milky cataract orb reflecting a lone beam
dead black pupil larger than a human torso
scarred socket barely visible in shadow
massive form barely stirring the dark
ancient and deliberate, slower than thought
emerging a fraction, then retreating to black
sparse marine snow catching dim light
scattered air bubbles lost in black

blackback_elder_monochrome.description: 黒背景固定・老体巨獣のモノクロ恐怖
blackback_elder_monochrome.text: {artistic_styles} of {creature_bases} showing {aging_details}. Scene locked to {color_mode_locked}; background is pure black. {lighting_scenarios} reveals only fragments as {visibility_constraints}. {water_particles} mark the void. {scale_markers} communicate impossible size. {eye_descriptions} sinks into shadow. {atmospheres} dominates. {movement_qualities}. Emphasize wrinkles, scars, and time-worn texture as primary horror.

blackback_fragment_close.description: 至近距離で皺と質感を主役にした断片
blackback_fragment_close.text: Extreme close-up {artistic_styles} focusing on {aging_details} of {creature_bases}. {color_mode_locked} with {visibility_constraints}. {lighting_scenarios} grazes the surface so wrinkles and fissures emerge from black. {water_particles} float between lens and skin. {eye_descriptions} may clip the frame, reinforcing {atmospheres}. {movement_qualities} feel barely alive. Fear comes from unseen mass and over-detailed aged flesh.

blackback_scale_reveal.description: 巨大さを黒に沈めつつ示すカット
blackback_scale_reveal.text: {artistic_styles} capturing {creature_bases} where {scale_markers} and {aging_details} break through the dark. {color_mode_locked} keeps background absolute black. {lighting_scenarios} provides minimal exposure, enforcing {visibility_constraints}. {water_particles} map depth. {eye_descriptions} hints at sentience. {atmospheres} pervades. {movement_qualities}. Composition uses negative space to make wrinkles and scars feel continent-sized.
